ncr.default_greeting: What do you want, civilian? We're busy here.

idle: Patrolling the Mojave almost makes you wish for a nuclear winter.
When I got this assignment I was hoping there would be more gambling.
It's been a long tour, all I can think about now is going back home.
You know, if you were serving, you'd probably be halfway to general by now.
You oughtta think about enlisting. We need good people here.
Just another day in the Mojave.
I heard the Legion's been moving troops again.
greeting: Keep your hands where I can see them.

rank_greetings.Idolized: Welcome, hero of the Republic! The NCR owes you a debt of gratitude. How can we assist?
rank_greetings.Admired: It's good to see a friend of the NCR. What brings you to us?
rank_greetings.Liked: Welcome back, ally. What do you need?
rank_greetings.Accepted: Good to see a friendly face. What's your business?
rank_greetings.Neutral: What do you want, civilian? We're busy here.
rank_greetings.Shunned: I've heard about your... activities. Watch yourself around here.
rank_greetings.Disliked: You're not welcome at this NCR installation. Leave.
rank_greetings.Hated: Leave immediately. You're an enemy of the Republic.
rank_greetings.Vilified: Guards! This enemy of the NCR is on base!

start.text: What do you want, civilian? We're busy here.

work.text: Good to hear. We always need help with various tasks around here.

volunteer.text: Talk to the quartermaster. He'll have something for you. Good luck, soldier.

supplies.text: The quartermaster tent is to the east. We're short on everything, but he'll find you something if he can.

supplies_location.text: Head east past the command tent. You can't miss it - there's a big 'Q' painted on the canvas.

missions.text: We've got raiders causing trouble to the east. Also, Legion scouts have been spotted north. It's been quiet... too quiet.

raiders.text: Clear out the raider camp at the old gas station. Bring back proof of elimination and you'll be rewarded.

legion_info.text: Just scouts so far. No main force, but we're watching the borders closely. Report any Legion activity immediately.

situation.text: Raiders to the east, Legion to the north. It's been quiet... too quiet. Stay alert out there, civilian.

rank_greetings.Idolized: Command says you're one of us. What do you need, hero?
rank_greetings.Vilified: I should take you in right now.

help.text: If you can fight, there's always use for another gun. Check with the sergeant for assignments.
